mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO interaction_reaction(target_type, target_id, reaction_type, user_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.targetType}, #{item.targetId}, #{item.reactionType}, #{item.userId}, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE update_time = VALUES(update_time)
INSERT IGNORE INTO interaction_reaction(target_type, target_id, reaction_type, user_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{reactionType}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW())
